title: Checkout 5xx Spike Response
summary: Identify root cause and mitigate when 5xx rate stays above 3% over a 5-minute window.
symptoms: Increase in customer payment failure reports
steps: Check top failing endpoints with status>=500 in the last 15 minutes
Verify recent deployment and feature flag changes
Temporarily shift traffic or roll back the offending endpoint
Check DB/external payment provider latency and adjust timeout if needed
Create post-incident analysis and document preventive actions

title: Kafka Consumer Lag Recovery
summary: Identify bottlenecks and restore throughput when consumer lag exceeds threshold.
symptoms: Low CPU usage but reduced throughput
steps: Identify hot keys on specific partitions
Review slow queries and outbound call latency

title: Slack Notification Delivery Failure
summary: Validate token, permissions, and rate limits when Slack delivery fails.
steps: Check token expiration and permission scopes
Send a verification message after recovery
